violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. A tube of raw ground beef was stored next to, and on, whole meat cuts in the reach in cooler in the kitchen
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. The plastic utensils in the holder above the salad bar were not stored with all of the handles facing the consumer. All handles should be facing the consumer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in cooler under the storage shelves needs to be cleaned.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
